query:
-- Créer les settings pour l'organisation Miss & Mister Dour
INSERT INTO organization_settings (
  organizationId, 
  primaryColor, 
  secondaryColor, 
  logoUrl,
  certificateStyle,
  verifyPageStyle,
  blockchainEnabled,
  socialScoringEnabled,
  voteAntifraudEnabled,
  auditLogsEnabled
)
VALUES (
  1,
  '#D4AF37',
  '#B8941E',
  'https://d3hk78fplavsbl.cloudfront.net/2tvrCaJBV8I6gabDLa4YCL-Captured''écran2026-01-29023306.png',
  'gold',
  'premium',
  1,
  1,
  1,
  1
);

-- Vérifier les settings créés
SELECT * FROM organization_settings WHERE organizationId = 1;
